_comment: Adventure-specific generated supporting characters. These explicit characters are intentionally not shared with the generic character.json pool; story files opt in with character_file.

ADVENTURE_ELDER_MARA.description: an elderly village woman with silver hair braided under a linen coif, a small stooped frame, wearing a faded blue wool gown, a brown apron, and a simple wooden pendant

ADVENTURE_HEALER_ALDEN.description: a middle-aged village healer with shoulder-length dark hair streaked with grey, a lean build, wearing a moss-green wool robe, a leather satchel, and small brass herb shears on his belt

ADVENTURE_BLACKSMITH_TOMAS.description: a broad-shouldered village blacksmith with short black hair, a thick dark beard, wearing a soot-marked leather apron over a rust-red tunic and heavy work boots

ADVENTURE_SICK_CHILD_ELIN.description: a small village child with wavy brown hair, a slight frame, wearing a cream linen nightshirt, a patched grey blanket, and a tiny carved bird charm on a cord

ADVENTURE_GATE_GUARD_ROWAN.description: a tall village gate guard with cropped auburn hair, a square build, wearing a quilted brown gambeson, a dark green cloak, and an iron-ring belt
